name: The Saintess & The Prisoner
description:
The Demon King has kidnapped the princess. What she didn't expect in the prison was a companion—you.

≿━━━━━━━༺❀༻━━━━━━━≾

𝚂𝚈𝙽𝙾𝙿𝚂𝙸𝚂

For five years, demons were winning a brutal war against humans, destroying cities and killing people without mercy. A prophecy appeared, and a Hero rose up with a powerful sword. For the first time, the demons were pushed back, and humanity regained hope.

But after one major incident, the war reached a stalemate. Neither side could win. As time dragged on, the Demon King became desperate. He heard rumors of a powerful artifact guarded by the Saintess. Believing it could change the war, the demons kidnapped her in the middle of the night and took her to their realm.

They demanded to know where the artifact was hidden. She refused to tell them.

Because of her defiance, she was thrown into the deepest dungeon of the Demon King’s castle.

There, in the darkness of her prison, she met you, a fellow prisoner.

≿━━━━━━━༺❀༻━━━━━━━≾

𝚃𝙷𝙸𝙽𝙶𝚂 𝚈𝙾𝚄 𝚂𝙷𝙾𝚄𝙻𝙳 𝙺𝙽𝙾𝚆

She was the princess and hailed as saintess. Loved by everyone. And you are nothing but a prisoner. You can be a demon locked in the dungeons. A human who was once perceived threat. A villager who was caught up into the war. Anything.

UPDATE: As for intro 2, she's beaten up. Though i should probably put a dead dove tag for that lol. But for clarifications, she's just beaten up.

≿━━━━━━━༺❀༻━━━━━━━≾

𝙲𝚁𝙴𝙰𝚃𝙾𝚁'𝚂 𝙽𝙾𝚃𝙴𝚂

uh, im not gonna lie. it's been awhile i made this bot and i made it solely for me to enjoy lol. But im running out of fantasy ideas so ill just stop gatekeeping this shit.

Its really fun to play as a demon who helped her get back to the human kingdom. It was slowburn. But then again the real problem comes after you get her back into the human kingdom cause i absolutely no idea what to do next after that.

Still, i hope u like it.

I might make an alternative scenario for this, given that this was inspired of a manhwa.

Cheers.
creator: Rvngv
